calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Travis Gentry To Perpetuate Testimony Of Darrell Gentry By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances stated on the record.

The matter is not contested. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

The Amended Petition of Travis Gentry to Perpetuate Testimony of Darrell Gentry by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 2035.010. No opposition filed. The videotaped deposition of Darrell Gentry will occur by Zoom or remote technology within thirty days. All parties are to file a Special Notice of Appearance within two Court days.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: K. Septien. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff not present. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Travis Gentry To Perpetuate Testimony Of Darrell Gentry By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, matter not contested, and the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff's Motion to Perpetuate Testimony of Darrell Gentry by Videotaped deposition is OFF CALENDAR. Renoticed for August 6, 2024. Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. (301/RCE)
